title: SpiderFlow — Multi-Step Form Authoring (GA, P1 closure)
summary: Full form_* MCP namespace (GA 2026-05-14, P1 closure). 27 methods (lifecycle + step composition + logic + variables + hidden + embed + validation + locking + versioning + responses). Typeform-class multi-step forms, lead capture, NPS / CSAT surveys, intake forms. Reuses booking_flows table with kind='form' (P1.Z sentinel-business pattern — agents OMIT business_id). 17 field types, conditional logic with canonical {op, left, right?} LogicRule shape (P1.W5), structural validation, per-form locking + version restore (P1.X) with 423 Locked envelope, submissions list/get (P1.M1), embed snippet generation via embed.spideriq.ai/v1/loader.js (3 KB, inline + popup). NOT in @spideriq/mcp-publish — only in kitchen-sink @spideriq/mcp@1.14.6. Use whenever the user asks for 'a form', 'survey', 'questionnaire', 'NPS', 'lead capture', 'intake form', 'Typeform alternative'.
